⚽ Internazionale v Bodo/Glimt, 21:00, Champions League — Bodo/Glimt carry a stunning 3-1 lead to San Siro — Norway's greatest ever Champions League night is within reach
⚽ Atlético Madrid v Club Brugge, 18:45, Champions League — All square after the first leg — Atlético must win at home against a resilient Club Brugge to advance
⚽ Bayer Leverkusen v Olympiacos, 21:00, Champions League — Leverkusen are strong favourites to advance but Olympiacos have nothing to lose at the BayArena
⚽ Newcastle United v FK Qarabag, 21:00, Champions League — Newcastle are virtually through — a 6-1 aggregate lead makes this second leg a near-meaningless dead rubber
